strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work (Optilyz, re:cinq), well beyond the 6-year requirement
Hands-on AI agent development at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks — a directly required and rare skill
Deep testing expertise: TDD/pairing/trunk-based practice at RIDE, author of test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and created testing courses/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin absent and Java exposure is dated/peripheral (robotic arms at Altom, 2016-2018); Python not listed
Significant recent work in niche DLang and Ember.js rather than the React-centric stack; Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named
response.justification: Against the role's core competencies: fullstack TypeScript/Node/React is evidenced by pricing-platform work at Optilyz (TypeScript, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK) and current product work at re:cinq; AI agent development is directly evidenced by MCP code-generator and agentic-framework contributions; cloud/containers by AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective; databases by MongoDB/MySQL/SQL; testing by TDD practice and authored test tooling; security/auth best practices are not explicitly evidenced. Gaps are Nest.js (absent), Kotlin (absent), and only dated Java. Given strong evidence on the highest-weight competencies and learnable framework gaps, the candidate is a strong fit.
